title: Calling all proud parents and schools!
description: GEORGE NEWS - The big day is almost here!...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The big day is almost here!

This Wednesday, 15 January, marks the start of the new school year, and thousands of excited Grade 1s will be stepping into their classrooms for the very first time.


> It's a milestone moment, and we want YOU to help us celebrate!


While we wish we could visit every school, we’d love for you to share your little one's big first-day smiles with us.

Send us your best snapshots, and we'll publish a selection in the George Herald the very next day!

Plus, full photo galleries will be uploaded to our website at www.georgeherald.com.

- Deadline: 09:30 on Wednesday morning, 15 January
- Email your photos to: [email protected]
- WhatsApp your pics in HD format to 082 784 3648
- Photo Tips: Image MUST be Jpeg format and at least 1MB in size


> Let’s make this a Grade 1 moment to remember!


Tag your fellow parents and spread the word!

#FirstDayOfSchool #Grade1Milestones #GeorgeHerald

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
